mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.username, u.real_name FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.send_time DESC
SELECT m.*, u.username, u.real_name FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = #{status} ORDER BY m.send_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'UNREAD'
SELECT m.*, u.username, u.real_name FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (user_id, title, content, type, status, send_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{status}, #{sendTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET status = 'READ', read_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
